name: Convert FormaCollection to FormaList

plannedActions.name: Change src/task.ts: import FormaList instead of FormaCollection (line 7)
Run tests to verify import change: npm test
Implement src/task.ts actions getter: return new FormaList(this.rawActions, Action, this.id) (lines 92-94)
Run tests to verify actions getter: npm test
Update src/task.ts JSDoc: replace 7 FormaCollection references with FormaList (lines 24, 38, 70, 84, 134, 186)
Change test/action.ts: import FormaList instead of FormaCollection
Replace test/action.ts FormaCollection.schemaOf(Action) with direct array schema (line 81)
Run tests to verify test/action.ts changes: npm test

references.text: FormaList has NO schemaOf() - use direct array schema like Task.avroSchema line 150 (serialization schema pattern)
Key difference: FormaCollection owns array (encapsulated), FormaList wraps external array (mutator)
No breaking changes: task.actions currently throws, has zero callers
FormaList constructor: new FormaList(items: T[], ItemClass, parentId?: UUID64)

summary: Deprecate FormaCollection in favor of FormaList throughout codebase
